canonical_definition: The observable production of extended reasoning traces that include planning, validation, and backtracking, resulting in longer and more detailed outputs compared to standard chain-of-thought.
papers: OASIS: Order-Augmented Strategy for Improved Code Search
Turning Trash into Treasure: Accelerating Inference of Large Language Models with Token Recycling
